a.xlink:title: MainWindow::MainWindow handles all of the main functionality and also the main window.
MainWindow::deselect clear the selection, password and copy buffer.
Get panel autoclear delay in seconds.
Get currently active pass backend instance.
QtPass::init make sure we are ready to go as soon as possible.
Get whether to disable line wrapping.
Get whether to use monospace font.
Initialize model with source model and store path.
MainWindow::setUiElementsEnabled enable or disable the relevant UI elements.
Ensure a folder path always ends with the native directory separator.
Verify that the required configuration is complete.
Initialize executable paths by auto-detecting them.
Check whether WebDAV integration is enabled.
Executor::executeBlocking blocking version of the executor, takes input and presents it as stdin.
Get whether to use pass (true) or GPG (false).
Locate an executable by searching the process PATH and (on Windows) falling back to WSL.
